title: Dynamic Programming States, Transitions, and Reconstruction · Invariant Triage
summary: Optimize resource allocation where overlapping choices defeat local heuristics. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a bottom-up optimizer with reconstructed decisions and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define minimal subproblem state that preserves all future-relevant information.
Derive transitions from exhaustive final choices and valid base cases.
Choose memoization or tabulation from reachability, order, depth, and memory needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Order the regression proof
steps.instruction: Order the Dp Correctness correctness-and-cost proof for this debug task before implementing it.
